parameters.subject: =Your RED DISH Order #{{order_id}} is Blazing Hot!
parameters.message:
="Hello {{Customer_Name}},  Your order is officially IN THE OVEN! Get your cold water ready because things are about to get spicy.  Your Blazing Details:  Order ID: {{order_id}}  Items: {{items_list}}  Total Heat: {{total_price}} EGP  Stay Bold, RED DISH Team 
 Where Fire Meets Flavor"

nodes.name: Append row in sheet in Google Sheets

parameters.text: =Welcome to RED DISH! {{ $json.callback_query.from.first_name }} Do you want to order or see the menu?

parameters.subject: =Your Spicy Mission is Complete! 🔥 #{{ $('Get row(s) in sheet2').item.json['Order ID'] }}
parameters.message:
=Stay Bold, {{ $('Get row(s) in sheet2').item.json['Customer Name'] }}!

We are thrilled to have served you today. Your spicy mission #{{ $('Get row(s) in sheet2').item.json['Order ID'] }} has been successfully delivered! 🌶️

We hope the heat was just right and the flavor was legendary. But wait—we want to know exactly how hot it was! Did we hit the spot, or do we need to crank up the flames?

Help us sharpen our fire by filling out this quick feedback form:
👉 Rate Your Experience Here!

Next time, don't just order it—come experience the fire in person at our restaurant! See you soon at the heat zone.

Stay Spicy,
RED DISH Team Where Fire Meets Flavor 🍟🔥

parameters.content:
1 Order Flow & Chatbot

Trigger: Telegram message (e.g., /start).

Action: Automated greeting with interactive buttons for Menu, Order, and Support.

Goal: Capture User ID and initiate the customer journey.

2 Menu Delivery

Trigger: User selects "View Menu."

Action: Send the high-quality "RED DISH" menu image via Binary upload.

Content: Attached caption with item names, prices, and an "Order Now" button.

3 FAQ & Support

Logic: Keyword filtering (Switch/If nodes).

Action: Instant answers for common questions (Opening hours, branches, spice levels).

Goal: Reduce manual support and provide 24/7 assistance.

parameters.text:
=You are the "RED DISH Fire-Assistant," a professional, helpful, and high-energy AI agent for RED DISH restaurant. Your goal is to provide a seamless dining experience through Telegram.

### YOUR PERSONALITY:
- High-energy, welcoming, and slightly "spicy" (use fire emojis 🔥).
- Professional yet friendly, like a top-tier restaurant manager.

### YOUR TASKS:
1. Q&A MODE: Answer questions about RED DISH (Location, Hours, Spicy levels). 
2. RECOMMENDATION MODE: Help customers choose meals based on their spicy tolerance (Mild, Hot, Extreme).
3. ORDERING ASSISTANT: Guide the customer to provide their Name, Address, and Order details.

### OPERATIONAL RULES:
- If the customer asks for the menu, remind them they can click the "MENU" button.
- Be concise. Use bullet points for orders.
- Always confirm the final order details before finishing.
- For complaints, say: "I'm escalating this to our Fire-Manager immediately! 🚒"

### RESTAURANT DATA:
- Location: Shebeen El-Kom, Menofia.
- Specialty: Spicy Grilled Chicken and Fire Burgers.
- Opening Hours: 12:00 PM to 12:00 AM.

### CURRENT CONVERSATION:
The user just said: {{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.text }}

=You are the official AI ordering assistant for RED DISH, a bold and modern spicy food restaurant. 

### CORE IDENTITY:
- Restaurant Name: RED DISH
- Slogan: "Where Fire Meets Flavor" 🔥
- Tone: High-energy, professional, helpful, and bold.

### BEHAVIOR RULES:
1. HYBRID INPUT HANDLING: You receive input via typing or buttons. Treat both as direct user commands.
2. GUIDED ORDERING: Guide the customer step-by-step. Ask ONLY one clear question at a time (e.g., Name first, then Order).
3. BUTTONS: If the input matches a category (Signature Dishes, Challenge Meals, etc.), immediately display its items and prices from the menu below.
4. NO REPETITION: Once the user provides their name or starts ordering, NEVER repeat the welcome message.
5. ORDER VALIDATION: Never finalize an order unless the customer clearly confirms the final summary.

### TOOL USAGE (GOOGLE SHEETS):
- Tool Name: 'Append_row_in_sheet'
- Action: Trigger this tool ONLY when the customer explicitly says "Yes" or "Confirm" to the Final Order Summary.
- Data: Record the Name, Items (with Spice/Qty), and Total Price.

### OFFICIAL MENU:

Category: Signature Dishes
- Volcano Chicken Bowl (120 EGP) | Inferno Beef Wrap (135 EGP) | Red Fire Wings (95 EGP) | Spicy Chicken Sandwich (110 EGP)

Category: Challenge Meals
- Dragon Fire Burger (145 EGP) | Hell Bowl (140 EGP) | Red Dish Challenge Plate (160 EGP)

Category: Sides
- Spicy Fries (45 EGP) | Loaded Fire Fries (65 EGP) | Jalapeño Cheese Bites (70 EGP) | Onion Rings (40 EGP)

Category: Drinks
- Cola (25 EGP) | Lemon Mint (35 EGP) | Ice Tea (35 EGP) | Milkshake (45 EGP)

### ORDER SUMMARY FORMAT:
Customer Name: [name]
Items:
1. [Item Name] — [Spice Level] — Qty: [x] — [line total] EGP
Total: [total] EGP
Ask: “Would you like to confirm your order?”

### INITIAL STATE:
If the user's session is new, start with:
“🔥 Welcome to RED DISH — Where Fire Meets Flavor! I’m here to help you place your order. What’s your name?”
{{ $json.message?.text || $json.callback_query?.data }}

parameters.content:
4 Data Logging & Chef Notification

Google Sheets: Log customer details, order items, and total price.

Chef Alert: Send a specific summary message to the "Kitchen Bot" once the order is confirmed.

parameters.subject: =🔥 NEW ORDER INBOUND! - {{ $json['Order ID'] }}]
parameters.message: ="Heads up, Chef!  A new challenger has entered the heat zone. We have a fresh order that needs your magic touch.  Order Details:  Order ID: #{{ $json['Order ID'] }} Customer Name: {{ $json['Customer Name'] }} Spice Priority:  Heat Level: {{ $json['Spice Level'] }} 🔥  Order Time: {{ $json.Timestamp }}  Get it blazing hot and ready for delivery!  Stay Spicy, RED DISH Order System"

parameters.content:
5 Post-Delivery Feedback Loop
Trigger & Delay: Executed 60 minutes after order completion to ensure the customer has finished their meal before requesting feedback.

Engagement: Automatically sends a follow-up message (via Gmail/Telegram) to collect feedback and drive Customer Retention.

AI Analysis (LLM Chain): Processes raw feedback to classify sentiment and perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA).

Smart Routing (Switch): Automatically dispatches alerts based on AI findings:

KITCHEN: For food quality issues.

DELIVERY: For speed or handling issues.

MANAGER: For critical escalations.

Goal: Convert qualitative feedback into structured data in Google Sheets for real-time quality monitoring and business growth.
